0.response: {"Q0":"The red planet always started with dirt so I knew to always start digging with a shovel, the blue planet always started with a boulder so I knew to always start digging with jack hammer."}

7.response: {"Q0":"The percentages, the arrows and the idea views before choosing"}

1.response: {"Q0":"No, I didn't change it except when I could no longer mine at the red planet since the astronaut was gone."}

2.response: {"Q0":"90% of the time, and toward the end when I only had to dig in the blue planet I would occassionally get stones instead of gems."}

8.response: {"Q0":"No, I was engrossed in all aspects of the task"}

4.response: {"Q0":"Yes, I could no longer collect gems from the planet hence no gold."}

10.response: {"Q0":"No technical issues. Although I feel sometimes I would choose a galaxy on time before the 1 second was up and the system would still tell me i was too slow."}

11.response: {"Q0":"I realluy enjoyed partcipating in the game. It was fun and interesting"}
